finding_results.notes: Hermione is not released arbitrarily. The Manor repeatedly routes her back to the same room, withholds release when she tries to leave the folio behind, and stabilizes the path only after she takes the house-selected book. The release also leaves durable residue: the relocated folio is now in her room and the clasp leaves contamination on her thumb.

The chapter no longer re-inventories the library with the Ch 2 mezzanine/ladder/atmosphere language. The scene now enters through Hermione's working problems: contradictory shelving, resistant texts, unknown scripts, and the Flamel discovery as active research material.
